name: Histwrite
description: Content-first Histwrite plugin for OpenClaw. Delegates deterministic commands to the local runner.

nodeBin.description: Node executable used to invoke the runner (default: node).

runnerEntry.description: Path to runner CLI entry. Defaults to ../runner/src/cli.ts.

defaultProjectDir.description: Optional default project directory passed to runner commands.

relayBaseUrl.description: Optional default relay base URL for capture-like commands.
